title: NoNether Plugin
description: Prevent players from entering the Nether.
body:
# рҹҢӢ NoNether

A lightweight **Minecraft Spigot/Paper plugin** that **completely disables access to the Nether**.  
Ideal for servers that want to restrict players to the Overworld or prevent Nether-based exploits.

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Features

- рҹҡ« Blocks players from entering the Nether via **nether portals**  
- вқҢ Cancels any **teleportation** to the Nether, including commands or plugins  
- вҸұ Sends a warning message **once per second** to avoid spam  
- вҡЎ Lightweight and easy to use вҖ” no configuration needed  

---

## рҹ“Ғ Installation

1. Download the plugin `.jar` file  
2. Place it inside your serverвҖҷs `plugins/` folder  
3. Start or reload your server  
4. The plugin works immediately вҖ” no configuration required  

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Configuration (`config.yml`)

```yaml
# Enable or disable Nether
nonether: true
ВҙВҙВҙ

---

## рҹ’¬ Example Message

When a player tries to enter the Nether:

> В§f[В§6В§lNoNetherВ§f] В§cThe Nether is disabled!  

This message is displayed at most **once per second** per player to prevent spam.  
You can modify the message in the code if you want a custom format.

---

## рҹ§© Developer Information

**Main plugin listener class:**  
`de.scholle.noNether.NoNetherListener`

**Blocked world:**  
`World.Environment.NETHER`

**Events handled:**  
- `PlayerPortalEvent`  
- `PlayerTeleportEvent`  

---

## рҹ§° Compatibility

- вң… Works on **Spigot**, **Paper**, and **Purpur**  
- рҹ§ұ Compatible with **Minecraft 1.18+**  
- вҡҷпёҸ Requires **Java 17+**

---

## рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹ’» Author

**Developed by:** Scholle  
**Package:** `de.scholle.noNether`
